case_title: CREDIT CORP SOLUTIONS, INC. VS. MARCO GARCIA ET AL

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION RE: VENUE (TRANSACTION ID # 74945161) FILED BY PLAINTIFF CREDIT CORP SOLUTIONS, INC.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR SEP-16-2025 CONTINUED TO NOV-25-2025 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610 FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) AND OBTAIN ANSWER(S), OR ENTER DEFAULT(S). NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR JUN-17-2025 CONTINUED TO SEP-16-2025 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610 FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF(S) OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) OF SUMMONS AND COMPLAINT. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

SUMMONS ISSUED (TRANSACTION ID # 74945161) TO PLAINTIFF CREDIT CORP SOLUTIONS, INC.
